narrative.headline: What 2022 Honda Accord owners report most
narrative.summary: Owners filed 204 complaints with NHTSA about the 2022 Honda Accord. Electrical problems lead the list at 37% of all reports, followed by the forward collision avoidance system at 28%. Most reports describe no crash or injury, but a handful in the top two areas did: 3 crashes and 4 injuries combined, and no fires were reported.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: The most reported area, with 75 complaints (37% of all reports). One of them involved a crash and one reported an injury; no fires were reported.
